value_chain_position: Data-center networking toll-taker — sells EOS-powered Ethernet switches and software for AI cluster fabrics, replacing InfiniBand in many hyperscaler builds.
relative_comps: ANET is the clearest AI-networking chokepoint in the public market: 54% FCF margins, 27% 3-year revenue CAGR, and the EOS software platform creates high switching costs at hyperscaler scale. CSCO is the legacy incumbent losing share; NVDA's InfiniBand competes in GPU clusters but ANET's Ultra Ethernet Consortium push challenges that. AVGO silicon is a supplier, not a competitor. No public peer matches ANET's combination of growth, margin and backlog visibility in cloud networking.
